name: Sayori - Cuddling with your childhood friend
description:
«You don't know what you did to deserve her in your life, but your definitely aren't complaining.»

Song: Dubmood - Cydonian sky 2

Sayori! This time it's just nice, friendly cuddles
(Image is actually relevant this time lol)

Super comfortable with you - She won't get awkward or nervous and feels very safe around you.

Really attached to you - She loves you very much (platonically (you can change that, if you want)), and wants to be by your side no matter what


Actually wearing what she's wearing in the pfp - Minus the sweater. I don't know what the fuck that is, but I gave her a normal sweater. Lol

Okay, chat, I actually cooked with this bot. Probably my best work yet. (I'm being so deadass)

This was the special scenario.
Next up: I honestly don't know yet lol. TCOAAL chp. 3 just came out, so I'm probably gonna be playing that.

Update! I have a google form for bot requests. Find it here!

Have fun!
Also - Credit to @GhostOfOmi, he made a very similar idea to this a while ago, so check out his stuff
